title: FreeDesktop Tea
description: Prevents your FreeDesktop capable computer from going to sleep while playing
body:
# FreeDesktop Tea
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/freedesktop-tea)
[![codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/Maganoos/freedesktop-tea)

FreeDesktop Tea is a simple mod that prevents any computer with a FreeDesktop capable Desktop Environment from sleeping while you are in-game.
This can be useful for example when AFK for long periods of time, and you don't want your computer to sleep so you can continue AFKing.
